problem id: ecd328ef
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) OR SHL(3)

examples:
  11000011 -> 11111000
  00100010 -> 10011000
  00110100 -> 10101101
  00101001 -> 01001010
  01001110 -> 11110011
  00010110 -> 10110101
  11101010 -> 11111010
  00100101 -> 01101001

query: 11010000
predicted answer: 10110100
